Title: RedPill - Private AI Chat & API URL Source: https://red-pill.ai/ Markdown Content: # RedPill - Private AI Chat & API | ChatGPT Alternative [![Image 1: RedPill](https://red-pill.ai/logo-horizontal-primary.svg?dpl=dpl_HfqjMrmb11pt3wSNALJ9r1ZQUd4g)](https://red-pill.ai/) ************************************ ************************************ ************************************ ************************************ ************************************ ************************************ # Your Private ChatGPT End-to-end encrypted. Powered by Confidential AI. Tools DeepSeek V3 NDA red flags checklist HIPAA minimum necessary: examples Meeting notes → action items template SaaS KPI glossary (ARR, NRR, churn)Term sheet key terms explained ## The Only All-in-One Private AI Stack From UI to confidential AI models to Private RAG - every layer runs in secure enclaves. Fully open source so you can verify every step. ### Private RAG Upload your documents and ask questions - all within an encrypted secure enclave. Your files never leave the TEE, ensuring complete confidentiality for sensitive data. ### E2E Encryption + TEE Hardware-secured privacy with cryptographic attestation - verify our claims yourself. ### Fully Open Source Don't trust, verify. Our full stack is open source - audit our encryption and privacy claims yourself. ### Confidential AI Models Access leading AI models running entirely within TEE secure enclaves - DeepSeek V3, GLM-4, Qwen, and more. Your prompts and responses stay encrypted end-to-end. ## Built for How You Work Whether you're protecting personal conversations, client privilege, or building secure applications Personal Legal Developer ### Your Thoughts Stay Yours Ask about health symptoms, relationship advice, or financial questions without your data being harvested, sold, or used to train AI models. ChatGPT stores everything. We store nothing. * **Zero data retention** - conversations deleted after session * **Never used for training** - your prompts stay private * **Encrypted sync** - access history across devices securely 01 ### Same Intelligence, True Privacy Get the same quality AI responses you expect from ChatGPT, but with cryptographic guarantees that your data is protected. No trade-offs between capability and privacy. * **50+ AI models** including DeepSeek V3, Qwen, GLM-4 * **Web search** - find current info privately 02 ## Explore AI Models From private models in GPU TEE to all your favorites. [![Image 3: qwen logo](https://www.redpill.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft0.gstatic.com%2FfaviconV2%3Fclient%3DSOCIAL%26type%3DFAVICON%26fallback_opts%3DTYPE%2CSIZE%2CURL%26url%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fqwenlm.github.io%2F%26size%3D32&w=48&q=75) Qwen: Qwen3.5-27B GPU TEE The Qwen3.5 27B native vision-language Dense model incorporates a linear attention mechanism, delivering fast response times while balancing inference speed and performance. Its overall capabilities are comparable to those of the Qwen3.5-122B-A10B. by phala|262K context|$0.30/M input|$2.40/M output Intel TDX NVIDIA CC](https://red-pill.ai/models/qwen/qwen3.5-27b)[![Image 4: z-ai logo](https://www.redpill.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft0.gstatic.com%2FfaviconV2%3Fclient%3DSOCIAL%26type%3DFAVICON%26fallback_opts%3DTYPE%2CSIZE%2CURL%26url%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fchat.z.ai%2F%26size%3D32&w=48&q=75) Z.AI: GLM 4.7 Flash GPU TEE As a 30B-class SOTA model, GLM-4.7-Flash offers a new option that balances performance and efficiency. It is further optimized for agentic coding use cases, strengthening coding capabilities, long-horizon task planning, and tool collaboration, and has achieved leading performance among open-source models of the same size on several current public benchmark leaderboards. by phala|203K context|$0.10/M input|$0.43/M output Intel TDX NVIDIA CC BETA](https://red-pill.ai/models/z-ai/glm-4.7-flash)[![Image 5: qwen logo](https://www.redpill.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft0.gstatic.com%2FfaviconV2%3Fclient%3DSOCIAL%26type%3DFAVICON%26fallback_opts%3DTYPE%2CSIZE%2CURL%26url%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fqwenlm.github.io%2F%26size%3D32&w=48&q=75) Qwen: Qwen3 Embedding 8B GPU TEE The Qwen3 Embedding model series is the latest proprietary model of the Qwen family, specifically designed for text embedding and ranking tasks. This series inherits the exceptional multilingual capabilities, long-text understanding, and reasoning skills of its foundational model. The Qwen3 Embedding series represents significant advancements in multiple text embedding and ranking tasks, including text retrieval, code retrieval, text classification, text clustering, and bitext mining. by phala|33K context|$0.01/M input|$0.00/M output Intel TDX NVIDIA CC](https://red-pill.ai/models/qwen/qwen3-embedding-8b)[![Image 6: phala logo](https://www.redpill.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft0.gstatic.com%2FfaviconV2%3Fclient%3DSOCIAL%26type%3DFAVICON%26fallback_opts%3DTYPE%2CSIZE%2CURL%26url%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fphala.network%2F%26size%3D32&w=48&q=75) Phala: Venice Uncensored 24B GPU TEE Venice Uncensored Dolphin Mistral 24B Venice Edition is a fine-tuned variant of Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501, developed by dphn.ai in collaboration with Venice.ai. This model is designed as an “uncensored” instruct-tuned LLM, preserving user control over alignment, system prompts, and behavior. Intended for advanced and unrestricted use cases, Venice Uncensored emphasizes steerability and transparent behavior, removing default safety and alignment layers typically found in mainstream assistant models. by phala|33K context|$0.20/M input|$0.90/M output Intel TDX NVIDIA CC](https://red-pill.ai/models/phala/uncensored-24b)[![Image 7: qwen logo](https://www.redpill.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft0.gstatic.com%2FfaviconV2%3Fclient%3DSOCIAL%26type%3DFAVICON%26fallback_opts%3DTYPE%2CSIZE%2CURL%26url%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fqwenlm.github.io%2F%26size%3D32&w=48&q=75) Qwen: Qwen3 VL 30B A3B Instruct GPU TEE Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct is a multimodal model that unifies strong text generation with visual understanding for images and videos. Its Instruct variant optimizes instruction-following for general multimodal tasks. It excels in perception of real-world/synthetic categories, 2D/3D spatial grounding, and long-form visual comprehension, achieving competitive multimodal benchmark results. For agentic use, it handles multi-image multi-turn instructions, video timeline alignments, GUI automation, and visual coding from sketches to debugged UI. Text performance matches flagship Qwen3 models, suiting document AI, OCR, UI assistance, spatial tasks, and agent research. by phala|128K context|$0.20/M input|$0.70/M output Intel TDX NVIDIA CC](https://red-pill.ai/models/qwen/qwen3-vl-30b-a3b-instruct)[![Image 8: sentence-transformers logo](https://www.redpill.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Ft0.gstatic.com%2FfaviconV2%3Fclient%3DSOCIAL%26type%3DFAVICON%26fallback_opts%3DTYPE%2CSIZE%2CURL%26url%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fhuggingface.co%2F%26size%3D32&w=48&q=75) Sentence Transformers: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 GPU TEE The all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding model maps sentences and short paragraphs into a 384-dimensional dense vector space, enabling high-quality semantic representations that are ideal for downstream tasks such as information retrieval, clustering, similarity scoring, and text ranking. by phala|512 context|$0.005/M input|$0.00/M output Intel TDX NVIDIA CC](https://red-pill.ai/models/sentence-transformers/all-minilm-l6-v2) [View All Models](https://red-pill.ai/models) ## Confidential AI Models No memory. No traces. The model knows nothing about you. ![Image 9: Confidential AI OFF - showing data exposure risks](https://red-pill.ai/_next/image?url=%2Fhome%2Fconfidential-ai-off.png&w=1080&q=75&dpl=dpl_HfqjMrmb11pt3wSNALJ9r1ZQUd4g) ![Image 10: Confidential AI ON - showing secure, encrypted processing](https://red-pill.ai/_next/image?url=%2Fhome%2Fconfidential-ai-on.png&w=1080&q=75&dpl=dpl_HfqjMrmb11pt3wSNALJ9r1ZQUd4g) ## Monopolized vs Private AI The AI you use shouldn't own your data. Choose privacy and transparency. ![Image 11: Monopolized AI](https://red-pill.ai/images/vs1.png) OpenAI Anthropic Google xAI Oracle ### Monopolized AI * Your data trains their models * Closed-source, unverifiable claims * Vendor lock-in, pricing control * Data breaches expose your prompts ![Image 12: Private AI](https://red-pill.ai/images/vs2.png) DeepSeek Qwen Llama Mistral+50 more ### Private AI * Open-source models + Confidential AI hosting * Cryptographic proof of privacy * Private RAG + Confidential Compute * Your data never leaves your control [Try Private AI](https://chat.redpill.ai/) VS # Trusted by Industry Leaders From AI infrastructure providers to law firms and security companies. RedPill powers privacy-first AI for organizations that can't compromise on confidentiality. [Try RedPill Free](https://chat.redpill.ai/) Our Partners & Integrations ![Image 13: NVIDIA](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/nvidia-inception.svg)![Image 14: Linux Foundation](https://www.linuxfoundation.org/hubfs/LF%20Logo%20White.svg)![Image 15: OpenRouter](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/open-router.svg)![Image 16: NEAR](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/near.svg)![Image 17: Vijil AI](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/Vijil_Logo.jpg)![Image 18: o.xyz](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/o.xyz.jpeg)![Image 19: Blue Nexus AI](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/bluenexus-logo.png)![Image 20: OODA](https://red-pill.ai/images/partners/ooda.svg) ![Image 21: Cameron](https://deifkwefumgah.cloudfront.net/shadcnblocks/block/avatar-1.webp) Cameron, Director of Near AI "RedPill's confidential computing approach aligns perfectly with our vision for decentralized AI. Their TEE infrastructure sets a new standard for privacy-preserving inference at scale." ![Image 22: Elizabeth Leon Gonzalez](https://deifkwefumgah.cloudfront.net/shadcnblocks/block/avatar-3.webp) Elizabeth Leon Gonzalez, Milligan, Beswick, Levine & Knox LLP "Attorney-client privilege is non-negotiable. RedPill is the only AI platform our firm trusts for case research and contract analysis. The cryptographic guarantees give us confidence no other tool can." ![Image 23: Vin Sharma](https://deifkwefumgah.cloudfront.net/shadcnblocks/block/avatar-2.webp) Vin Sharma, Founder at Vijil AI "As a security-focused AI company, we evaluated every private AI solution on the market. RedPill's end-to-end encryption and TEE architecture passed our most rigorous security audits." ![Image 24: Chris Were](https://deifkwefumgah.cloudfront.net/shadcnblocks/block/avatar-4.webp) Chris Were, CEO at Blue Nexus AI "We built Blue Nexus on the belief that personal AI should be truly personal. RedPill's infrastructure lets us deliver that promise - your AI assistant that never shares your secrets." ## Solutions for Every User Private AI for everyone. Choose the plan that fits your needs. ### Free Try RedPill risk-free with 14 days of access to basic AI models and E2E encryption. #### Get Started * Access to basic AI models * 10 messages per day * E2E encryption included * Web access [Start Free Trial](https://chatgpt.redpill.ai/) Most Popular ### Pro For individuals & professionals who need unlimited messaging, Private RAG, and 50+ latest models. #### $35/month (billed annually) * 50+ latest models (DeepSeek V3, Qwen, GLM-4) * Unlimited messaging * Private RAG - upload & query documents * 10 GB file storage * 30 Deep Research queries/month [Get Pro](https://chatgpt.redpill.ai/upgrade) ### Enterprise For teams & organizations needing admin controls, SSO, on-premise deployment, and dedicated support. #### Custom Pricing * Everything in Pro * Admin console & team management * SSO & audit logs * On-premise / VPC deployment * Dedicated account manager [Talk to Sales](https://cal.com/team/phala/redpill) ### Developer Build with our API. Pay-as-you-go access to 50+ models with OpenAI-compatible endpoints. #### Pay as you go * Access to all 50+ models via API * OpenAI-compatible endpoints * Transparent per-token pricing * Smart Router for cost optimization * Full E2E encryption [Get API Key](https://www.redpill.ai/dashboard) ### Ready to Build AI People Trust? Schedule a demo to see how RedPill can secure your AI use cases. [Schedule a DEMO](https://cal.com/team/phala/redpill)[View Pricing](https://red-pill.ai/pricing) ## Frequently Asked Questions Everything you need to know about Confidential AI ### How does Confidential AI ensure my data is truly private? ### Is there any performance impact compared to regular AI APIs? ### How difficult is it to integrate Confidential AI into my existing application? ### What models are available through Confidential AI? ### How can I verify that my data was actually protected? ### What are the pricing differences compared to standard AI APIs? Enterprise Ready # Complete Compliance & Security Readiness RedPill meets the highest security and compliance standards for regulated industries. Our TEE-based architecture ensures your data stays protected while meeting enterprise requirements. ![Image 25: SOC2](https://phala.com/trust/soc2.png)![Image 26: HIPAA](https://phala.com/trust/hipaa.svg) ## SOC 2 Type II Certified Annual audits verify our security controls for data protection, availability, and confidentiality meet enterprise standards. ![Image 27: SOC2](https://phala.com/trust/soc2.png) ## HIPAA Compliant Healthcare organizations can safely use RedPill with protected health information. BAAs available for enterprise customers. ![Image 28: HIPAA](https://phala.com/trust/hipaa.svg) ## GDPR & ISO 27001 Full compliance with EU data protection regulations and internationally recognized information security management. ![Image 29: GDPR](https://deifkwefumgah.cloudfront.net/shadcnblocks/block/compliance/ISO-27001.svg) #### Ready to experience private AI? Try RedPill in our Private AI Playground - no signup needed. Your conversations stay encrypted and completely private. [Try RedPill Free](https://chat.redpill.ai/) Private Chat E2E Encrypted AI Hi! I'm your private AI assistant. Ask me anything - your conversations are fully encrypted. Zero data retention TEE secured [![Image 30: RedPill](https://red-pill.ai/logo-horizontal-primary.svg?dpl=dpl_HfqjMrmb11pt3wSNALJ9r1ZQUd4g)](https://red-pill.ai/) Privacy-first AI solutions that keep your data secure and confidential. * [](https://x.com/redpill_gpt) * [](https://discord.com/invite/jxc4cK5NqA) ### Products * [Private Chat](https://chat.redpill.ai/) * [Private Gateway](https://docs.redpill.ai/privacy/tee-protection) * [Private Inference](https://docs.redpill.ai/privacy/confidential-ai/overview) ### Developers * [Documentation](https://docs.redpill.ai/) * [GitHub](https://github.com/redpill-ai) ### Resources * [API Reference](https://docs.redpill.ai/developers/api-reference/overview) * [Support](https://cal.com/team/phala/redpill) [© 2026 Hashforest Technology LLC.
